description: Calculate and store the favorite destination for each user profile in the 'demodb' database. Add a new STRING property named 'FavoriteDestination' to the 'Profiles' vertex class. For every Profile, determine the country where the user has stayed the most times based on 'HasStayed' edges connecting Profiles to Hotels. Update the 'FavoriteDestination' property with this country name, choosing any in case of a tie. If a user has no booking history, leave the property empty (NULL). Credentials: root / GymAnything123!
